biography:
Kévin Azaïs (born 1992) is a French actor. He is best known for his performance in the film Love at First Fight (Les Combattants), for which he won a César Award for Most Promising Actor and a Lumières Award for Best Male Revelation.

He is the brother of actor Vincent Rottiers.
